'''âd-dh-zh''' ('''kadadhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbid|unbid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbid|unbid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadadhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadhazh|thidadhazh]] || [[word:jidadhazh|jidadhazh]] || [[word:shidadhazh|shidadhazh]] || [[word:kidadhazh|kidadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadhazh|thuthudadhazh]] || [[word:jujudadhazh|jujudadhazh]] || [[word:shushudadhazh|shushudadhazh]] || [[word:kukudadhazh|kukudadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudadhazh|thudadhazh]] || [[word:judadhazh|judadhazh]] || [[word:shudadhazh|shudadhazh]] || [[word:kudadhazh|kudadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudadhazh|thudadhazh]] || [[word:judadhazh|judadhazh]] || [[word:shudadhazh|shudadhazh]] || [[word:kudadhazh|kudadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedadhazh|thedadhazh]] || [[word:jedadhazh|jedadhazh]] || [[word:shedadhazh|shedadhazh]] || [[word:kedadhazh|kedadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodadhazh|thothodadhazh]] || [[word:jojodadhazh|jojodadhazh]] || [[word:shoshodadhazh|shoshodadhazh]] || [[word:kokodadhazh|kokodadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodadhazh|thodadhazh]] || [[word:jodadhazh|jodadhazh]] || [[word:shodadhazh|shodadhazh]] || [[word:kodadhazh|kodadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodadhazh|thodadhazh]] || [[word:jodadhazh|jodadhazh]] || [[word:shodadhazh|shodadhazh]] || [[word:kodadhazh|kodadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdadhazh|thĂŠdadhazh]] || [[word:jĂŠdadhazh|jĂŠdadhazh]] || [[word:shĂŠdadhazh|shĂŠdadhazh]] || [[word:kĂŠdadhazh|kĂŠdadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadadhazh|thathadadhazh]] || [[word:jajadadhazh|jajadadhazh]] || [[word:shashadadhazh|shashadadhazh]] || [[word:kakadadhazh|kakadadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadadhazh|thadadhazh]] || [[word:jadadhazh|jadadhazh]] || [[word:shadadhazh|shadadhazh]] || [[word:kadadhazh|kadadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadadhazh|thadadhazh]] || [[word:jadadhazh|jadadhazh]] || [[word:shadadhazh|shadadhazh]] || [[word:kadadhazh|kadadhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadadhazh|shadadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadadhazh|goshadadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadadhazh|gokishadadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadadhazhnĂŒ|shadadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnknĂŒ|goshadadhazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhnĂŒ|gokishadadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadadhazhshĂ«|shadadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkshĂ«|goshadadhazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhshĂ«|gokishadadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadhazhro|shadadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkro|goshadadhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhro|gokishadadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadhazhmu|shadadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkmu|goshadadhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhmu|gokishadadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadadhazhsher|shadadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnksher|goshadadhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhsher|gokishadadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadadhazhng|shadadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkng|goshadadhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhng|gokishadadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadadhazhya|shadadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkya|goshadadhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhya|gokishadadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadadhazhyam|shadadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkyam|goshadadhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhyam|gokishadadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|shadadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadhazhnĂŒro|shadadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnknĂŒro|goshadadhazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhnĂŒro|gokishadadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadhazhnĂŒmu|shadadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnknĂŒmu|goshadadhazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhnĂŒmu|gokishadadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shadadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadhazhshĂ«ro|shadadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkshĂ«ro|goshadadhazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhshĂ«ro|gokishadadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadhazhshĂ«mu|shadadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkshĂ«mu|goshadadhazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhshĂ«mu|gokishadadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadhazhronĂŒ|shadadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkronĂŒ|goshadadhazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhronĂŒ|gokishadadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadhazhroshĂ«|shadadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkroshĂ«|goshadadhazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhroshĂ«|gokishadadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadhazhromu|shadadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkromu|goshadadhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhromu|gokishadadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadhazhmunĂŒ|shadadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkmunĂŒ|goshadadhazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhmunĂŒ|gokishadadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadhazhmushĂ«|shadadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkmushĂ«|goshadadhazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhmushĂ«|gokishadadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadhazhmuro|shadadhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadhazhnkmuro|goshadadhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadhazhmuro|gokishadadhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
